# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: DSA Practice Meets AI Guidance Update
- Summary: Showcase how CodeGrind’s DSA practice now pairs real-time AI assistance with problem-solving and updated authentication flow visuals.
- Slug: codegrind-dsa-practice-and-ai-assistant-updates
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-dsa-practice-and-ai-assistant-updates
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-07-18-codegrind-dsa-practice-and-ai-assistant-updates.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind blends LeetCode-style challenges with Azure OpenAI-powered guidance, new Google Sign-In, and an upgraded Code Breach tower-defense aesthetic to deepen learning through interactive play and AI-assisted problem solving.
- CTA: Try a practice problem with AI help now and sign in with Google for a seamless learning session.
- Visual brief: Static hero-style graphic featuring a coding editor split-screen with AI assistant chat on one side and a live DSA problem on the other; include subtle cyberpunk UI elements and a prominent CodeGrind logo.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
